   333→
   334→// executeHumanStepBranch handles human intervention branches with Git-based manual intervention workflow
   335→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeHumanStepBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   336→	// Parse timeout from branch inputs
   337→	timeout := 30 * time.Minute // default timeout
   338→	if timeoutStr, ok := branch.Inputs["timeout"].(string); ok {
   339→		if parsedTimeout, err := time.ParseDuration(timeoutStr); err == nil {
   340→			timeout = parsedTimeout
   341→		}
   342→	}
   343→	
   344→	// Create timeout context for this branch
   345→	branchCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, timeout)
   346→	defer cancel()
   347→	
   348→	// Get build error context
   349→	buildError, _ := branch.Inputs["buildError"].(string)
   350→	if buildError == "" {
   351→		buildError = "Build failure - human intervention required"
   352→	}
   353→	
   354→	// Check if runner is available for production mode
   355→	if o.runner == nil {
   356→		result.Status = "failed"
   357→		result.Notes = "human-step branches require production runner (not available in test mode)"
   358→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   359→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   360→		return result
   361→	}
   362→	
   363→	gitProvider := o.runner.GetGitProvider()
   364→	buildChecker := o.runner.GetBuildChecker()
   365→	workspaceDir := o.runner.GetWorkspaceDir()
   366→	
   367→	if gitProvider == nil || buildChecker == nil {
   368→		result.Status = "failed"
   369→		result.Notes = "human-step branches require GitProvider and BuildChecker"
   370→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   371→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   372→		return result
   373→	}
   374→	
   375→	// Step 1: Create intervention branch name
   376→	interventionBranch := fmt.Sprintf("human-intervention-%s", branch.ID)
   377→	
   378→	// Step 2: Create MR for human intervention
   379→	mrReq := provider.MRRequest{
   380→		Title:        fmt.Sprintf("Human Intervention Required: %s", branch.ID),
   381→		Description:  fmt.Sprintf("Build Error:\n```\n%s\n```\n\nPlease fix the build failure and commit your changes to this branch for automated validation.", buildError),
   382→		SourceBranch: interventionBranch,
   383→		TargetBranch: "main",
   384→	}
   385→	
   386→	mrResult, err := gitProvider.CreateMR(branchCtx, mrReq)
   387→	if err != nil {
   388→		result.Status = "failed"
   389→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Failed to create human intervention MR: %v", err)
   390→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   391→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   392→		return result
   393→	}
   394→	
   395→	// Step 3: Poll for manual commits and validate build
   396→	pollInterval := 30 * time.Second
   397→	ticker := time.NewTicker(pollInterval)
   398→	defer ticker.Stop()
   399→	
   400→	for {
   401→		select {
   402→		case <-branchCtx.Done():
   403→			// Timeout reached
   404→			result.Status = "timeout"
   405→			result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Human intervention timed out after %v", timeout)
   406→			result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   407→			result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   408→			return result
   409→			
   410→		case <-ticker.C:
   411→			// Check if human made changes by attempting build validation
   412→			buildResult, err := buildChecker.CheckBuild(branchCtx, workspaceDir, 10*time.Minute)
   413→			if err != nil {
   414→				continue // Build check failed, keep polling
   415→			}
   416→			
   417→			if buildResult != nil && buildResult.Success {
   418→				// Human fixed the build!
   419→				result.Status = "completed"
   420→				result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Human intervention successful via MR %s - build now passes", mrResult.WebURL)
   421→				result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   422→				result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   423→				return result
   424→			}
   425→			
   426→			// Build still fails, continue polling
   427→		}
   428→	}
   429→}
   430→

content.content:
1→package provider
     2→
     3→import "context"
     4→
     5→// GitProvider defines the interface for git forge providers (GitLab, GitHub, etc.)
     6→type GitProvider interface {
     7→	CreateOrUpdateMR(ctx context.Context, config MRConfig) (*MRResult, error)
     8→	ValidateConfiguration() error
     9→}
    10→
    11→// MRConfig contains all parameters needed to create or update a merge request
    12→type MRConfig struct {
    13→	RepoURL      string   // HTTPS repository URL (e.g., "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git")
    14→	SourceBranch string   // workflow branch name (e.g., "workflow/java17-migration/20250905")
    15→	TargetBranch string   // base_ref from config (e.g., "refs/heads/main")
    16→	Title        string   // MR title derived from workflow
    17→	Description  string   // MR description with step summaries
    18→	Labels       []string // default labels ["ploy", "tfl"]
    19→}
    20→
    21→// MRResult contains the result of MR creation or update
    22→type MRResult struct {
    23→	MRURL   string // GitLab MR web URL for browser access
    24→	MRID    int    // GitLab MR numeric ID for API operations
    25→	Created bool   // true if created, false if updated existing MR
    26→}
    27→

1→package common
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"fmt"
     5→	"io"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"time"
     9→
    10→	utils "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/utils"
    11→)
    12→
    13→// DeployConfig contains all deployment parameters
    14→type DeployConfig struct {
    15→    App           string
    16→    Lane          string
    17→    MainClass     string
    18→    SHA           string
    19→    IsPlatform    bool   // true for ployman, false for ploy
    20→    BlueGreen     bool
    21→    Environment   string // dev, staging, prod
    22→    ControllerURL string
    23→    Metadata      map[string]string
    24→    Timeout       time.Duration
    25→}
    26→
    27→// DeployResult contains deployment outcome information
    28→type DeployResult struct {
    29→	Success      bool
    30→	Version      string
    31→	DeploymentID string
    32→	URL          string
    33→	Message      string
    34→}
    35→
    36→// SharedPush handles deployment for both ploy and ployman
    37→func SharedPush(config DeployConfig) (*DeployResult, error) {
    38→	// Validate configuration
    39→	if err := validateConfig(config); err != nil {
    40→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid configuration: %w", err)
    41→	}
    42→
    43→	// Generate SHA if not provided
    44→	if config.SHA == "" {
    45→		if v := utils.GitSHA(); v != "" {
    46→			config.SHA = v
    47→		} else {
    48→			config.SHA = time.Now().Format("20060102-150405")
    49→		}
    50→	}
